title: Multicolor Sound Reactive 32 LED Strip Lights, 200 cm - Built-In Mic, Perfect for Parties, Movie Nights, Bedroom, & TV Ambiance - Single Piece
features: VIBRANT & DYNAMIC LIGHTING: Dive into a world of color with multicolor sound reactive 32 LED strip lights. Measuring 200 cm, these lights offer 15 mesmerizing color variations and seven speeds to perfectly match your mood or event.
DURABLE & SAFE: Crafted from high-quality materials, these LED strip lights are built to last. Enjoy a durable, safe, and visually stunning lighting experience in any room of your house.

POWERFULLY PORTABLE: Operating on 3 X AA batteries (not included) for the strip and 1 X CR-2302 battery (included) for the remote, our LED lights offer the ultimate mix of convenience and portability.

VERSATILE & EASY INSTALLATION: At 200 cm (2 meters) with a flexible adhesive backing, these LED lights offer the perfect fit for any room. Wrap them around your TV, line your bedroom walls, or add a splash of color to your movie nights.

SOUND REACTIVE SENSATION: With a built-in sensitive microphone, these lights aren't just visually stunning, they're interactive. Watch in awe as they pulsate, change colors, and dance in sync with the music around them
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality LED strip lights with 32 LED lights offer 15 color variations and seven speeds. Control the lights with ease using the remote control. Safety Warning No warning applicable
